replies.text: Good. I worry when I can't reach you.
No, no — I'll be quick. I just needed to hear your voice.
I could tell. I always know when you're thinking about me.
I'm fine, sweetheart. It's you I'm calling about.
Okay. I believe you. Call me this weekend?
Oh, honey. I miss you too. Come visit soon.
That's — okay. Okay. Just keep me posted.
I love you. That's enough. That's everything.
Eggs and toast. Good. That's all I needed to know.
Half a granola bar. I can't — okay. I'm not going to say anything.
I can hear you chewing. That's new.
I'm starting with it because I want to know.
Your father always said he slept best when he had no responsibilities. I didn't find that comforting then either.
Four in the morning. Doing what?
Fine as in fine or fine as in you don't want to talk about it?
I sleep fine. I worry instead. It takes up about the same amount of time.
Very yours. Okay. And when's the last time you cleaned it?
What does evolving mean? Evolving like how?
Who is anyone.
I heard something. From your cousin.
Good. I was worried you were isolating.
What does in your head mean? You can call me, you know.
That sounds exhausting. Are you okay?
People are busy. You're busy. I understand.
Your stride. Okay. What does that look like?
Freelancing. And is that — that's okay? That's stable?
More responsibility without a title change is how they get you, sweetheart.
I know how it is. That's why I'm asking.
Autopay. Good. That's very adult of you.
Manageable. Okay. What does manageable mean exactly.
Color coding. Like a spreadsheet. With colors.
The economy is insane. And yet rent is still due.
Focusing on yourself. That's — that's healthy. I think.
Oh! What's their name? What do they do?
I didn't ask. I just asked if you were seeing someone.
I'm your mother. This is what I do.
You leave the TV on. For company. Okay.
A roommate. And you didn't tell me? Is it a nice person?
A podcast. Where someone talks. Yes. Those exist.
It sounded like it was inside the room.
A whole thing. Right.
A little tight. Since when?
She told me because she was worried. That makes two of us.
She told me because she loves you. We all do.
A five-year plan. Can I hear it?
The beginning of a plan is still a plan. I'll take it.
Seventeen. And which one is winning?
Still becoming. You know I worry about that.
The mall. At 2pm. For a client meeting.
Oh, sweetheart. How long ago? Why didn't you call me?
Don't blame Rachel. She called me because she cares.
You work nights. Since when.
Working on it. Meaning you're still together.
Final. You're sure.
The couch. He's sleeping on the couch.
I know you're handling it. I just want to know how.
Already paid. Good. Okay.
I can send you something. Please let me send you something.
I won't ask. But I want to ask.
It's not handled if you won't tell me how.
Looking into it. Tell me when you know more.
Made peace. At 28.
Like a business. What kind of business.
Okay. Let's talk about something else.
Recently like last month, or recently like when I made you go three years ago?
No insurance. Okay. Okay. I'm breathing.
You read about your body. That's not the same as a doctor.
Feeling great is not a checkup.
Wait — I thought you said…
Hmm. That's a little different from what you said before.
Hold on. Earlier you told me —
That's not what you just said.
Okay, sweetheart. Okay. I love you.
I'll stop worrying. For now.
I'm booking a flight.
Don't tell me not to worry. I am going to worry.
I know, baby. I always know.
You don't have to pretend with me.
I'm proud of you. I don't say that enough.
Mmhm.
Sunday. I'll keep the phone close.
Good. Then I'll stop worrying. For now.
Unpredictable means what.
Okay. Okay. I'll be here.
You don't have to explain. I just need to know.
I'm not reading into it. You called it complicated.
That's not a no.
Okay. I'm here when you do.
Good. That's all I needed to hear.
Okay. Good. I didn't say anything.
What does that mean, that kind of mess.
I can come down. I'll bring supplies.
Managing isn't the same as okay.
You don't sound like you love it.
That's a no.
I knew it. I could hear it.
Alex. Okay. And they treat you well?
You've been seeing someone and you don't know what they do?
Fine. I can wait.
So it's really new. Okay. Okay.
Good. What's their name?
You not mentioning things is always a big deal to me.
How fast is fast.
I wouldn't have — okay. I would have had questions.
A couple of months. And you didn't say anything.
What thing.
That's not an answer.
What happened. Tell me.
An overview. Okay. When.
A direction is something. That's something.
Variables like what.
I know. I could tell.
You think, or you know.
Pick one. Any one. Just start.
That's honest, at least.
That's not a plan. That's just living.
Okay. Okay. That makes sense.
Worrying me and worrying yourself aren't the same thing.
That's not an answer, sweetheart.
I wouldn't have — okay. I would have panicked a little.
This year is a big window.
Feeling fine is not a checkup.
Nobody forgets a doctor's visit that recently.
We're finding you a doctor this week.
Your roommate. I see.
That's what I thought. Thank you.
Your neighbor has a key. That's interesting.
People. Right.
She was worried. That's not nothing.
She said it sounded like a lot to handle.
Fine like how.
I'll be the judge of that.
Right. Old building.
Okay. And are you — okay?
Your laptop mic. Okay.
I'm listening. That's what I do.
A little help from who.
Which friend. Are they okay with that.
Okay. Okay. Good.
That's not an answer.
She didn't worry over nothing.
Mutually. And who's helping you.
I don't think she did.
That's not how worrying works.
Barely isn't ideal.
Working on it like how.
You didn't have autopay before.
Okay. Good. Keep me posted.
